title: 3 RM, BD - With B2B Corporate, Solution Sales or SME Loans Exp / Hunter Role
description:
Due to expansion. Our client, a Japanese Leasing MNC is seeking 3 experience Relationship Manager, Business Development for Hire Purchase Division 


Requirements 

  • Proven stability in a B2B Corporate Sales, Solution Sales., Bank or Leasing Capital Loans company, preferably two years or more

  • A hunter’s sense, a desire for sales, a proactive and aggressive demeanor. Highly self-motivated, confident, tenacious and results driven. 

  • A self-starter and a team player with Degree holder preferably from the business / finance / accounts discipline and able to value add having good network with SME or Commercial Sales

  • Hardworking, good working attitude, perseverance and resilience 

  • For experience candidate, brings along min 1 year of relevant SME experience in Commercial Loans (Secured and Unsecured), Property Loans, Hire Purchase of Machinery and Equipment, Shipping Loans, Working Capital Loans and etc.

  • Good understanding of accounting and financial statements

  • Proficient in report writing, as he/she will be responsible for preparing credit proposals, which will include financial analysis.

  • The successful candidates will be placed in different position level based on their working experiences/education level.


Responsibilities

  • Prospect for new SME customers and pro-actively market financial solutions in Commercial Sales to meet their needs in commercial Loans (Secured and Unsecured), Property Loans, Hire Purchase of Machinery and Equipment, Shipping Loans, Working Capital Loans and etc

  • Manage and service your portfolio of accounts 

  • Understanding basic financial terminology

  • Generate and achieve revenue target assigned 

  • Report writing and responsible for preparing credit proposals and financial analysis.


Other Information

  • Central Town

  • Working Days/ Hours: Mon to Fri, 8.30am to 5.45pm

  • Basic Salary: RM, BD up to $7,000 (exclude commission)

  • Monthly Commission payout upon hitting KPI 

  • $100 Mobile reimbursement + Annual Variable Bonus up to 2-4 Months based on individual and company performance

  • Company vehicle provided for on-site client visit for those with driving license.

  • For candidates without license public transport (Taxi/Grab) claimable and full reimbursement.


If you possess relevant experience, interested applicant kindly send in your resume. We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
At Search Index, we believe in working along closely with our clients in an enduring partnership towards successful career placement. We specialise in identifying and assessing candidates and recruiting them from junior to senior level roles across all industry sectors.

We provides end-to-end solutions ranging from

  • Permanent, Contract, Temporary and Project based placement.
  • Executive Search
  • Payroll and Staff Management

Search Index is committed in providing the highest level of service with our extensive knowledge of human resources, consultancy and search expertise.

We work with Local Small Medium Enterprise (SMEs) and Multinational Companies (MNCs) across various industries.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH INDEX PTE. LTD.
